sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68816" key="mosxe/laion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μοσχ-έλαιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n68816.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oil scented with musk</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.20</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
